honest_read: At n=48 (stratified random, seed=42), **engram_bm25** (58%) ≥ BM25 (58%) overall. Best budget retriever (58%) matches or beats full-context (35%) on this slice. **knowledge-update:** engram_bm25=38% ties bm25=38%. **multi-session:** full_context=38%, bm25=50%, engram_bm25=50%. **single-session-preference:** full_context underperforms budget methods (preference questions may need targeted retrieval, not full haystack). Token economics: full-context ~45× more context tokens than budget retrievers (~35× estimated API cost). engram / engram_expand omitted in Round 3 (established at n=24). **full_context caveat:** **mixed caps** (110,000×39, 8,000×3, 3,000×6 rows) — default 30,000; lower caps used when OpenRouter credit prompt limit hit mid-run. Compare budget retrievers fairly; full_context is not a uniform ~110k baseline on this run.
cache_reuse_notes:

Round 2 overlap: 6 question IDs (may reuse cached retriever rows).
